Stable SDL3-CS bugfix release for SDL 3.4.12.

This release publishes the managed `SDL3-CS` wrapper and platform-specific native NuGet packages for Windows, Linux, macOS, Android, iOS, and tvOS. Native packages use `SDL3-CS.<Platform>` and `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.<Addon>` package IDs.

## Package Versions

| Package family | Version |
|----------------|---------|
| `SDL3-CS` | `3.4.12.1` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>` | `3.4.12.1` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Image` | `3.4.4.7` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Mixer` | `3.2.4.7` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.TTF` | `3.2.2.7` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Shadercross` | `3.0.0.7` |

## Changes

- Fixed [Issue #200](https://github.com/edwardgushchin/SDL3-CS/issues/200) by enabling DirectXShaderCompiler support in desktop SDL_shadercross builds for macOS and Linux while preserving Windows DXC support.
- Added `libdxcompiler` and `libdxil` to macOS/Linux ShaderCross runtime packages together with the required DirectXShaderCompiler license and third-party notice files.
- Added an HLSL-to-SPIR-V runtime smoke test after every Linux and macOS SDL_shadercross native build.
- Pinned Linux x64 to the upstream-verified official DXC archive and built DXC from the pinned vendored source for macOS and Linux arm64.
- Verified the macOS arm64 package end-to-end on Apple Silicon: ShaderCross initialization succeeded and both vertex and fragment HLSL compiled to SPIR-V.

The add-on package revision is `7` because revisions `1` through `5` already exist and revision `6` was previously published and unlisted; NuGet package versions are immutable.
